title: Fashion Friday - What I Wore to Urbanic's Holiday Soiree
excerpt: For Urbanic's holiday party, I wore this American graffiti dress from Varga . I went with a more casual look ( posted on Instagram ) with jeggings, boots, a sweater and a scarf because it was a bit cooler out.…
body: For Urbanic's holiday party, I wore this American graffiti dress from Varga. I went with a more casual look (posted on Instagram) with jeggings, boots, a sweater and a scarf because it was a bit cooler out. And when I say cooler, I mean 60 degrees.
